holdings.infoBox: RSPF is an equity ETF with a total of 79 individual holdings. The top holdings are Morgan Stanley stock at 1.70%, Interactive Brokers Group at 1.69%, State Street at 1.65%, Robinhood Markets at 1.63%, and Franklin Resources at 1.62%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P 500 Equal Weight Financials ETF (RSPF) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 Equal Weighted / Financials index. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of financial stocks pulled from the S&P 500. RSPF was launched on Nov 1, 2006 and is issued by Invesco.
